news_items.headline: Intent Laundering: AI Safety Datasets Are Not What They Seem - arXiv
news_items.summary:
Intent Laundering: AI Safety Datasets Are Not What They Seem

Title:

Description:

# Intent Laundering: AI Safety Datasets Are Not What They Seem

Shahriar Golchin, Marc Wetter Applied Machine Learning Research {sgolchin, mwetter}@labelbox.com

###### Abstract

We systematically evaluate the quality of widely used adversarial safety datasets from two perspectives: in isolation and in practice. In isolation, we examine how well these datasets reflect real-world adversarial attacks based on three defining properties: being driven by ulterior intent, well-crafted, and out-of-distribution. # From Model Safety to Runtime Governance

Published: 2026-04-23T14:38:05+00:00

## Summary

As AI systems evolve into stateful tool-using agents that can mutate records, access enterprise systems, and operate across multi-step workflows, the core governance question is no longer "Model Safety" but "Is the next specific action authorized under current policy, identity, approval state, data boundaries, and budget constraints?" # LLM Leaderboard: Best AI Models Ranked (April 2026) - DEV Community

Published: 2026-04-23T07:33:09+00:00

## Summary

There is no single best AI model in the world in April 2026, with Claude Opus 4.7 dominating coding benchmarks at 82% on SWE-bench Verified and ranking first on LM Arena with 1504 Elo rating. Three models tied at the top of the Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index (score of 57), including Claude 4. 7, Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview, and GPT-5.4. news_items.headline: DeepSeek V4 Released: Open-Source 1.6T MoE, 1M Context, Apache 2.0 — and It's Already on the API
news_items.summary:
# DeepSeek V4 Released: Open-Source 1.6T MoE, 1M Context, Apache 2.0 — and It's Already on the API - DEV Community

Published: 2026-04-24T04:51:46+00:00

## Summary

DeepSeek has released its Open-Source 1.6T MoE, 1M Context, Apache 2.0, and API pricing of $1.74 / $3.48 per million tokens for Pro. The release was timed to coincide with OpenAI's GPT-5.5. Both OpenAI ChatCompletions and Anthropic protocols are supported. news_items.summary:
# SynapseKit - A Production-Grade LLM Framework Built for Speed, Simplicity, and Scale - DEV Community

Published: 2026-04-23T07:39:11+00:00

## Summary

SynapseKit is an open-source Python framework for building applications powered by large language models (LLM applications), designed for engineers who need production-grade tooling without complexity. The framework covers the full surface area from a single LLM call to multi-agent orchestration with cost guardrails. It offers a design philosophy that prioritizes speed, debuggability, and minimal abstraction. The open-licensed Python framewor

# Fathym Launches fai — Giving Developers Permanent Ownership of Their AI Context Across Every Tool They Use

Published: 2026-04-23T10:00:00+00:00
Author: Scott Smith

## Summary

Fathym, Inc. has launched fai, an open source command system that allows developers to maintain their AI context across all tools they use. news_items.headline: South Africa Aligns AI Policy with Global Standards, Emphasizing Trust and Innovation
news_items.summary:
South Africa Aligns AI Policy with Global Standards, Emphasizing Trust and Innovation

Connect with us

Hi, what are you looking for?

South Africa’s Draft National Artificial Intelligence Policy, published in the Government Gazette on April 10, aims to position the country within both global and African frameworks. While it aspires for South Africa to rely less on foreign technology, the policy does not sufficiently address the lack of a robust foundation for digital inclusion.
